productName: Fruit Burst Vibes - Tubular Tangerine 1:1:1 THC:CBD:CBG 300mg
description: Soft, nostalgic chews with a caramel-shop texture, handmade-candy energy, and a smooth cannabis infusion blended right into the recipe. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift, CBD to keep things calm and balanced, and CBG to support daytime focus and clarity in a 1:1:1 ratio. The flavor does the inviting, and the cannabis infusion follows with a smooth finish.
